providers.name: 2embed
providers.customizations: Supports both TMDB and IMDB IDs, with specific endpoints for individual episodes or full seasons.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL: https://www.2embed.cc

### Embed Example:
- Movie: https://www.2embed.cc/embed/129
- TV: https://www.2embed.cc/embedtv/1399&s=1&e=1

### URL Structure:
- Movies: `https://www.2embed.cc/embed/{id}`
- TV Shows: `https://www.2embed.cc/embedtv/{id}&s={season}&e={episode}`
- Full Seasons: `https://www.2embed.cc/embedtvfull/{id}`

### Supported IDs:
- TMDB (numeric)
- IMDB (with 'tt' prefix)

### Query Parameters:
- `s`: Season number (for TV)
- `e`: Episode number (for TV)
- `imdb_id`: Used in JSON API
- `tmdb_id`: Used in JSON API

### Player Events / PostMessage API:
- Not explicitly documented in provided content.

### Integration Notes:
- Use standard `<iframe>` tags.
- The provider acts as a content aggregator.
- API endpoints available at `https://api.2embed.cc/` for metadata retrieval.

providers.customizations: Mirror service for 2embed.cc; supports identical URL patterns and API endpoints.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL: https://2embed.skin

### Embed Example:
- Movie: https://www.2embed.cc/embed/129
- TV: https://www.2embed.cc/embedtv/1399&s=1&e=1

### URL Structure:
- Movies: `https://www.2embed.cc/embed/{id}`
- TV Shows: `https://www.2embed.cc/embedtv/{id}&s={season}&e={episode}`
- Full Seasons: `https://www.2embed.cc/embedtvfull/{id}`

### Supported IDs:
- TMDB (numeric)
- IMDB (with 'tt' prefix)

### Query Parameters:
- `s`: Season number (for TV)
- `e`: Episode number (for TV)
- `imdb_id`: Used in JSON API
- `tmdb_id`: Used in JSON API

### Player Events / PostMessage API:
- Not explicitly documented in provided content.

### Integration Notes:
- Use standard `<iframe>` tags.
- This domain is an alias/mirror for the 2embed.cc service.
- API endpoints available at `https://api.2embed.cc/` for metadata retrieval.

providers.name: 2embed.stream
providers.customizations: Provides an auto-detect `iframe.php` endpoint that handles both movies and TV shows automatically.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL: https://2embed.stream

### Embed Example:
- Movie: https://www.2embed.stream/embed/movie/129
- TV: https://www.2embed.stream/embed/tv/1399/1/1

### URL Structure:
- Movies: `https://www.2embed.stream/embed/movie/{id}`
- TV Shows: `https://www.2embed.stream/embed/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Auto-detect: `https://www.2embed.stream/iframe.php?id={id}`

### Supported IDs:
- TMDB (numeric)
- IMDB (with 'tt' prefix)

### Query Parameters:
- `id`: Required for iframe.php

### Player Events / PostMessage API:
- Not explicitly documented in provided content.

### Integration Notes:
- Use standard `<iframe>` tags.
- Fully responsive player design.
- Content is aggregated; no hosting on provider servers.

providers.name: AeonWatch
providers.customizations: Supports versioning (v2/v3), AutoPlay, Poster toggles, and advanced AutoNext features for TV series.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://thisiscinema.pages.dev

### Embed Example
- Movie: https://thisiscinema.pages.dev/?type=movie&version=v3&id=129
- TV: https://thisiscinema.pages.dev/?type=tv&version=v3&id=1399&season=1&episode=1

### URL Structure
- Movies: `/?type=movie&version={v2|v3}&id={id}`
- TV: `/?type=tv&version={v2|v3}&id={id}&season={s}&episode={e}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDb (Numeric)
- IMDb (tt prefix)

### Query Parameters
- `type`: Required. 'movie' or 'tv'.
- `version`: Required. 'v2' or 'v3'.
- `id`: Required. TMDb or IMDb ID.
- `season`: Required for TV. Integer.
- `episode`: Required for TV. Integer.
- `poster`: Optional. Boolean (true/false).
- `autoPlay`: Optional. Boolean (true/false).
- `autoNext`: Optional. Boolean (true/false). Requires TMDb ID.
- `totep`: Optional. Total episodes in season. Required for AutoNext.
- `tsn`: Optional. Total seasons. Required for AutoNext.
- `showAutoNextButton`: Optional. Boolean (true/false).

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- Not documented.

### Integration Notes
- The provider uses query parameters on the root URL to load the player.
- AutoNext functionality is restricted to TMDb IDs and requires additional metadata parameters (`totep`, `tsn`).
- Recommended to use a local static server for testing to avoid iframe/CORS issues.

providers.name: Cinemaos

None documented.

providers.name: Cinezo API
providers.customizations: Extensive UI customization including colors, fonts, and feature toggles (PiP, Chromecast, etc.).
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://player.cinezo.live

### Embed Example
https://player.cinezo.live/embed/movie/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/embed/movie/{tmdbId}`
- **TV Shows**: `/embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
- **Anime**: `/embed/anime/{AnilistId}/{number}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies & TV)
- AniList (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `primarycolor`: Main player theme color (e.g., `e8b86d`)
- `secondarycolor`: Secondary accent color (e.g., `c49de8`)
- `iconcolor`: Player icon color (e.g., `ffffff`)
- `autoplay`: Auto-play on load (`true`/`false`)
- `poster`: Show movie poster (`true`/`false`)
- `chromecast`: Enable Chromecast support (`true`/`false`)
- `servericon`: Show server selection button (`true`/`false`)
- `setting`: Show player settings button (`true`/`false`)
- `pip`: Enable Picture-in-Picture mode (`true`/`false`)
- `font`: Subtitle font family (e.g., `Roboto`)
- `fontcolor`: Subtitle text color (e.g., `e8b86d`)
- `fontsize`: Subtitle font size in pixels (e.g., `20`)
- `opacity`: Subtitle opacity 0-1 (e.g., `0.8`)
- `logourl`: Custom logo URL
- `server`: Server name or number for playback
- `dub`: For anime, audio preference (`true`/`false`)

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- **Progress Tracking**: Event-driven system monitoring `play`, `pause`, and `seeked` events to enable resume functionality.

### Integration Notes
- Highly customizable UI via query parameters.
- Supports anime via AniList IDs with specific dubbing controls.

providers.name: Embed Icefy

providers.llm_profile:

- episode: Episode number (for TV)

### Player Events / PostMessage API:

providers.name: GdrivePlayer
providers.customizations: Basic IMDB-based movie embedding via a dedicated player page.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://api.gdriveplayer.us/

### Embed Example
http://database.gdriveplayer.us/player.php?imdb=tt1285016

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `http://database.gdriveplayer.us/player.php?imdb={imdb_id}`
- **TV Shows**: Not provided (API endpoints exist for data, but no player embed URL is documented).

### Supported IDs
- IMDB

### Query Parameters
- `imdb` (Required): The IMDB ID of the movie.

### Player Events / PostMessage API
None documented.

### Integration Notes
- The player is hosted on a separate subdomain (`database.gdriveplayer.us`) compared to the API documentation site.
- The API provides various endpoints for searching and listing movies, anime, and drama, but the actual video playback is handled via the `player.php` endpoint.

providers.name: GoDrivePlayer
providers.customizations: Supports custom external subtitles via .vtt files or JSON configurations.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://godriveplayer.com/

### Embed Example
https://godriveplayer.com/player.php?imdb=tt17048514

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/player.php?imdb={imdb_id}`
- **TV Shows**: `/player.php?type=series&tmdb={tmdb_id}&season={season}&episode={episode}`

### Supported IDs
- IMDB (for Movies)
- TMDB (for TV Shows)

### Query Parameters
- `imdb` (Required for movies): IMDB ID with `tt` prefix.
- `type` (Required for TV): Set to `series`.
- `tmdb` (Required for TV): TMDB ID.
- `season` (Required for TV): Season number.
- `episode` (Required for TV): Episode number.
- `sub.file` (Optional): URL to a `.vtt` subtitle file.
- `sub.label` (Optional): Label for the custom subtitle.
- `sub.info` (Optional): JSON string containing multiple subtitle configurations.

### Player Events / PostMessage API
None documented.

### Integration Notes
- Custom subtitles must be served with the `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` header to avoid CORS issues.
- The player is responsive and supports quality selection.

providers.name: KiraStreams API

- TMDB

None documented.

- Integrated with OpenSubtitles for automated captioning.

providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL: https://www.nontongo.win

### Embed Example:
- Movie: https://www.NontonGo.win/embed/movie/129
- TV: https://www.NontonGo.win/embed/tv/1399/1/1

### URL Structure:
- Movies (TMDB): `https://www.NontonGo.win/embed/movie/{tmdb_id}`
- TV Shows (TMDB): `https://www.NontonGo.win/embed/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}`

providers.name: PrimeSRC
providers.customizations: Supports server filtering (whitelist/blacklist), custom server ordering, and start-time offsets.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://primesrc.me

### Embed Example
- Movie: https://primesrc.me/embed/movie?tmdb=129
- TV: https://primesrc.me/embed/tv?tmdb=1399&season=1&episode=1

### URL Structure
- Movies: `/embed/movie?tmdb={id}` or `/embed/movie?imdb={id}`
- TV: `/embed/tv?tmdb={id}&season={s}&episode={e}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB
- IMDb
- TVMaze

### Query Parameters
- `imdb`: IMDb ID string
- `tmdb`: TMDB ID integer
- `tvmaze`: TVMaze ID integer
- `season`: Season number (required for TV)
- `episode`: Episode number (required for TV)
- `fallback`: Boolean (default true), enables third-party sources
- `serverOrder`: Comma-separated list of server names
- `whitelistServers`: Comma-separated list of allowed servers
- `blacklistServers`: Comma-separated list of excluded servers
- `startAt`: Integer, start time in seconds

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- Not documented.

### Integration Notes
- Use the Info API (`/api/v1/list_servers`) to verify server availability before embedding.
- TV episode numbering follows TVMaze standards, which may differ from TMDB.

providers.name: SpenEmbed
providers.customizations: Custom accent colors via the 'theme' query parameter.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://spencerdevs.xyz/

### Embed Example
https://spencerdevs.xyz/movie/533535

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/movie/:id`
- **TV Shows**: `/tv/:id/:season/:episode`
- **Anime**: `/anime/:id/:episode`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies and TV Shows)
- AniList (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `theme` (Optional): Custom theme color hex code without the # (e.g., `00ffc9`).

### Player Events / PostMessage API
None documented.

### Integration Notes
- Embeds are responsive; it is recommended to use a container with `aspect-video` for optimal display.
- No rate limits are currently enforced.

providers.name: SuperEmbed
providers.customizations: VIP player access, custom subtitle injection, and server-side PHP implementation.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://multiembed.mov/

### Embed Example
https://multiembed.mov/?video_id=522931&tmdb=1

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `?video_id=:id&tmdb=1` (TMDB) or `?video_id=tt:id` (IMDB)
- **TV Shows**: `?video_id=:id&tmdb=1&s=:season&e=:episode` (TMDB)
- **VIP Player**: `/directstream.php?video_id=:id`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB
- IMDB (supports `tt0000000` or just the numeric ID)

### Query Parameters
- `video_id` (Required): The IMDB or TMDB ID.
- `tmdb` (Required for TMDB): Set to `1` to indicate a TMDB ID is being used.
- `s` or `season` (Required for TV): Season number.
- `e` or `episode` (Required for TV): Episode number.
- `check` (VIP only): Set to `1` to check if the VIP player is available (returns 0 or 1).
- `sub_url` (VIP only): URL to a custom subtitle file (must be urlencoded).
- `sub_label` (VIP only): Label for the custom subtitle (must be urlencoded).

### Player Events / PostMessage API
None documented.

### Integration Notes
- The VIP player (`/directstream.php`) offers multi-quality, fast HLS streaming, and fewer ads.
- Advanced integration is available via a downloadable PHP player file for server-side redirection.

providers.name: TryEmbed
providers.customizations: Audio format selection (/sub or /dub), autoplay, auto-skip, and precise start timestamps.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://tryembed.us.cc/

### Embed Example
https://tryembed.us.cc/embed/anime/172463/1/sub

### URL Structure
- **Anime**: `/embed/anime/:id/:episode/:lang`
- **Language Path**: Use `/sub` for subtitles or `/dub` for dubbed audio.

### Supported IDs
- AniList

### Query Parameters
- `autoplay` (Optional): Set to `true` to force video autoplay.
- `autoSkip` (Optional): Set to `true` to automatically bypass intro/outro sequences.
- `startAt` (Optional): Timestamp in seconds to begin playback.

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Supports a secure messaging bridge for parent applications:
- **Commands**:
    - `play` / `pause`: `{}` - Toggles playback state.
    - `seek`: `{ time: number }` - Jumps to specific second.
    - `volume`: `{ level: number }` - Adjusts volume (0.0 to 1.0).
- **Events**: Listens for `PLAYER_EVENT` which returns `event` and `currentTime`.

### Integration Notes
- Specifically designed for Anime content.
- Ad-free experience with native Auto-Next and Auto-Skip features.

providers.name: VidFast
providers.customizations: Extensive player customization via query parameters including themes, UI toggles, and playback behavior.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidfast.pro
- Embed Example: https://vidfast.pro/movie/129
- URL Structure:
  - Movie: `/movie/{id}`
  - TV: `/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB, IMDB
- Query Parameters:
  - `title`: Toggle media title display
  - `poster`: Toggle poster image display
  - `autoPlay`: Start playback automatically
  - `startAt`: Start time in seconds
  - `theme`: Player color (hex code)
  - `server`: Set default server
  - `hideServer`: Hide server selector
  - `fullscreenButton`: Toggle fullscreen button
  - `chromecast`: Toggle Chromecast button
  - `sub`: Default subtitle language (e.g., en, es, fr)
  - `nextButton`: Show 'Next Episode' button (TV only)
  - `autoNext`: Auto-play next episode (TV only)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: None documented
- Integration Notes: Supports multiple mirror domains including .pro, .in, .io, .me, .net, .pm, and .xyz.

providers.name: VidKing
providers.customizations: Customizable primary colors, autoplay, episode navigation, and specific start times.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://www.vidking.net/

### Embed Example
`https://www.vidking.net/embed/movie/1078605`

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/embed/movie/{tmdbId}`
- **TV Series**: `/embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB

### Query Parameters
- `color` (string): Primary color hex code without # (e.g., `ff0000`).
- `autoPlay` (boolean): Enable automatic playback.
- `nextEpisode` (boolean): Show next episode button (TV only).
- `episodeSelector` (boolean): Enable episode selection menu (TV only).
- `progress` (number): Start time in seconds.

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Events are sent via `window.postMessage` in the following structure:
- **Events**: `timeupdate`, `play`, `pause`, `ended`, `seeked`.
- **Data Payload**: Includes `currentTime`, `duration`, `progress`, `id`, `mediaType`, `season`, and `episode`.

### Integration Notes
- **Storage**: Uses isolated `localStorage` for different configurations to prevent conflicts.
- **Performance**: Optimized using HLS.js.

providers.name: VidLink
providers.customizations: Extensive UI branding (colors, icons), player engine selection (JWPlayer), and external subtitle support.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://vidlink.pro/

### Embed Example
`https://vidlink.pro/movie/786892`

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/movie/{tmdbId}`
- **TV Shows**: `/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
- **Anime**: `/anime/{MALid}/{number}/{subOrDub}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies & TV)
- MyAnimeList / MAL (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `primaryColor` (string): Hex color for sliders/controls.
- `secondaryColor` (string): Hex color for progress bar background.
- `iconColor` (string): Hex color for player icons.
- `icons` (string): Icon style (`vid` or `default`).
- `title` (boolean): Show/hide media title.
- `poster` (boolean): Show/hide poster image.
- `autoplay` (boolean): Enable automatic playback.
- `nextbutton` (boolean): Show next episode button at 90% progress.
- `player` (string): Player type (`jw` for JWPlayer or `default`).
- `startAt` (number): Start time in seconds.
- `sub_file` (string): Direct link to external VTT subtitle file.
- `sub_label` (string): Label for external subtitle track.
- `fallback_url` (string): Redirect URL if stream fails.
- `fallback` (boolean): For anime, force fallback to sub/dub if type not found.

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- **MEDIA_DATA**: Sends content details and watch progress for "Continue Watching" features.
- **PLAYER_EVENT**: Sends playback states (`play`, `pause`, `seeked`, `ended`, `timeupdate`) including `currentTime` and `duration`.

### Integration Notes
- Supports professional JWPlayer integration.
- Allows external VTT subtitle injection.
- Provides a robust `postMessage` system for tracking user progress across devices.

providers.name: VidNest
providers.customizations: Extensive UI control hiding and server selection via query parameters.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL: https://vidnest.fun

### Embed Example: https://vidnest.fun/movie/129

### URL Structure:
- Movies: `https://vidnest.fun/movie/{tmdb_id}`
- TV: `https://vidnest.fun/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Anime: `https://vidnest.fun/anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}/{sub_or_dub}`

### Supported IDs:
- TMDB (Movies/TV)
- AniList (Anime)

### Query Parameters:
- `startAt` / `progress`: Start time in seconds.
- `server`: Force server (lamda, primesrc, sigma, alfa, beta, gama, catflix, hexa, delta).
- UI Controls: `servericon`, `topcaption`, `topsettings`, `centerseekbackward`, `centerplay`, `centerseekforward`, `timeslider`, `mute`, `volume`, `timegroup`, `bottomcaption`, `bottomsettings`, `pip`, `cast`, `fullscreen`, `prevepisode`, `nextepisode` (values: hide, false, 0, off).

### Player Events / PostMessage API:
- Supports event-driven progress tracking for resume functionality.

### Integration Notes:
- No API keys required.
- Use standard iframe with `allowFullScreen`.

- Anime: `https://player.vidplus.to/embed/anime/{AnilistId}/{number}?dub={trueOrFalse}`

providers.name: VidSrc.co
providers.customizations: Extensive UI customization including primary/secondary/icon colors, subtitle styling, and control visibility.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://player.vidplus.to
- Embed Example: https://player.vidplus.to/embed/movie/129
- URL Structure:
    - Movies: `/embed/movie/{tmdbId}`
    - TV Shows: `/embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
    - Anime: `/embed/anime/{anilistId}/{episode}?dub={true|false}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB (Movies/TV), AniList (Anime)
- Query Parameters:
    - `primarycolor`: Hex color for sliders/autoplay (e.g., `B20710`)
    - `secondarycolor`: Hex color for progress bar background (e.g., `170000`)
    - `iconcolor`: Hex color for player icons
    - `autoplay`: `true` or `false`
    - `autoNext`: `true` or `false`
    - `nextButton`: `true` or `false`
    - `fontcolor`: Hex color for subtitles
    - `fontsize`: Subtitle font size in px
    - `opacity`: Subtitle background opacity (0.0 to 1.0)
    - `poster`: `true` or `false` to show content poster
    - `title`: `true` or `false` to show content title
    - `icons`: `vid` for VidStack style or `default`
    - `progress`: Starting position in seconds
    - `watchparty`: `true` or `false` to enable synchronized viewing
    - `chromecast`: `true` or `false` to enable Chromecast
    - `episodelist`: `true` or `false` to show episode list
    - `servericon`: `true` or `false` to show server icon
    - `server`: Server name or number (e.g., `hindi` or `14`)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented
- Integration Notes: Embed via iframe with `frameborder="0"` and `allowfullscreen`.

providers.name: VidSrc.me
providers.customizations: Player color can be customized by adding `/color-{hex}` to the end of the URL.
providers.llm_profile:

    - TV Shows: `/embed/{imdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: IMDB
- Query Parameters: None (uses path-based customization)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented
- Integration Notes: The provider uses IMDB IDs. Customization is handled via a path suffix `/color-{hex}`.

providers.customizations: Supports custom player accent colors via URL suffix.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://v2.vidsrc.me
- Embed Example: https://v2.vidsrc.me/embed/129
- URL Structure: 
  - Movies: /embed/{tmdb_id}
  - TV: /embed/{tmdb_id}/{season}-{episode}
- Supported IDs: TMDB, IMDB (supports tt-prefixed IDs)
- Query Parameters: 
  - color-{hex}: Customizes player accent color (e.g., color-15006D)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented.
- Integration Notes: 
  - Responsive iframe design.
  - Supports WordPress plugins for Dooplay/Psyplay themes.
  - Ad reduction available for high-traffic sites (>10k daily users).

providers.name: VidSrc.to
providers.customizations: Supports custom subtitles via single file or JSON configuration.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidsrc.to
- Embed Example: https://vidsrc.to/embed/movie/129
- URL Structure:
    - Movie: `/embed/movie/{id}`
    - TV Show: `/embed/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB, IMDB (IMDB IDs must include the `tt` prefix)
- Query Parameters:
    - `sub.info`: A JSON string containing an array of subtitle objects (e.g., `[{ "file": "url", "label": "English", "kind": "captions" }]`)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented
- Integration Notes: Custom subtitle files must be served with the `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` header.

providers.name: VidSrc.vip
providers.customizations: Player customization available via query parameters.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidrock.ru
- Embed Example: https://vidrock.ru/movie/129
- URL Structure:
    - Movie: `/movie/{id}`
    - TV Show: `/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB, IMDB
- Query Parameters: Mentioned as available for player customization, but specific keys are not listed in the documentation.
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented
- Integration Notes: Although the provider name is VidSrc.vip, the API endpoints are hosted on `vidrock.ru`.

providers.name: VixSrc
providers.customizations: Extensive UI customization (colors), playback control (autoplay, start time), and language selection.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vixsrc.to
- Embed Example: https://vixsrc.to/movie/129
- URL Structure:
    - Movie: `/movie/{tmdbId}`
    - TV Show: `/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB
- Query Parameters:
    - `primaryColor`: Hex color code (without #) for sliders and controls
    - `secondaryColor`: Hex color code (without #) for the progress bar background
    - `autoplay`: Boolean (`true`/`false`)
    - `startAt`: Start time in seconds
    - `lang`: Preferred audio track language (e.g., `it`)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Events sent via `postMessage` to parent window:
    - `play`, `pause`, `seeked`, `ended`, `timeupdate`
    - Data structure: `{ type: "PLAYER_EVENT", data: { event: string, currentTime: number, duration: number, video_id: number } }`
- Integration Notes: Offers custom embed domains and custom CDN proxying to bypass ISP blocks.

providers.name: VidUP
providers.customizations: Supports theme customization via hex codes and various UI toggle parameters.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidup.to/

- URL Structure: 
  - Movies: `https://vidup.to/movie/{id}`
  - TV: `https://vidup.to/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: IMDB, TMDB
- Query Parameters: title, poster, autoPlay, startAt, theme, server, hideServer, fullscreenButton, chromecast, sub
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented
- Integration Notes: Supports IMDB or TMDB IDs. Theme accepts hex codes.

  - TV: `https://player.vidzee.wtf/embed/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}`

providers.name: Vidzen

providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidzen.fun/
- Embed Example: https://vidzen.fun/movie/666243
- URL Structure: 
  - Movies: `https://vidzen.fun/movie/[TMDB_ID]`
  - TV: `https://vidzen.fun/tv/[TMDB_ID]/[SEASON]/[EPISODE]`
- Supported IDs: TMDB
- Query Parameters: server, startAt, autoplay, muted
- Player Events / PostMessage API: `MEDIA_DATA` event via `window.postMessage` for progress tracking.
- Integration Notes: Requires `allowFullScreen`. Progress data is stored in `localStorage`.

providers.name: Docs
providers.customizations: Unified API aggregating 8 providers with automatic quality sorting.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vyla-api.pages.dev
- Embed Example: https://vyla-api.pages.dev/api/player
- URL Structure: 
  - Movies: `https://vyla-api.pages.dev/api/player?id={tmdb_id}&type=movie`
  - TV: `https://vyla-api.pages.dev/api/player?id={tmdb_id}&s={season}&e={episode}&type=tv`
- Supported IDs: TMDB
- Query Parameters: id, type, s, e
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Not documented
- Integration Notes: API returns CORS headers `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`. Provides enriched stream/download data.
